snippets.title: A Vite project's scripts
snippets.explanation: A common pattern: tsc type-checks, then Vite produces the optimized production bundle.

snippets.title: Tree-shaking depends on ESM imports
snippets.explanation: Named ES module imports let the bundler remove unused code; namespace/dynamic imports can defeat tree-shaking.

snippets.title: Run TypeScript directly with tsx
snippets.code:
npx tsx ingest.ts ./docs      # no separate build step
# vs a build: tsc && node dist/ingest.js
snippets.explanation: tsx transpiles and runs TS on the fly, handy for scripts and dev.
